Headline: Closure - Luton Independent School, Luton
Info: An independent school in Luton abruptly closed, attributing its 'financial pressures' and subsequent closure to the impending VAT on school fees.

Headline: Merger - St Lawrence College, Ramsgate, Kent
Info: Merger plans between St Lawrence College and Dover College were halted following a significant backlash, despite St Lawrence College facing 'imminent closure' due to financial difficulties.

Headline: Closure - Dean Hole CofE Primary School (State), Caunton, Nottinghamshire
Info: Nottinghamshire County Council confirmed the permanent closure of Dean Hole Church of England Primary School, a state school with only eight pupils, citing significant financial and operational difficulties.

Headline: Financial - UK Choir Schools (Independent)
Info: Alexander Armstrong warned that independent choir schools are at risk of closure, stating they lack the financial capacity to absorb Labour's proposed 20 per cent VAT levy on private school fees.

Headline: Closure - Flintshire Schools (State), Flintshire
Info: A final decision on the proposed permanent closure of five state schools in Flintshire has been temporarily delayed following a legal challenge.
